reviews.comment:
Muy lentos para atender, falta coordinacion!! Una empleada ( dedujo que era del area de oficina, aunque su atuendo no era prolijo), perooo estaba revisando algo en la maquina que los playeros realizan la cobranza y hablaba por telefono todo el tiempo y no los dejaba realizar dicha tarea ya q estaba parada hablando por celular donde ellos debian cobrar.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service, lack of coordination!! One employee (I deduced she was from the office area, although her attire wasn't neat), but she was checking something on the machine that the attendants use for payments and was talking on the phone the whole time, preventing them from doing their job since she was standing there talking on her cell phone where they were supposed to be collecting payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5blppS0pnEAE
